title: Lab 05: Users Groups And Sudo
description: Create local users on servervm with minimal useradd usage and delegated sudo rules.

tasks: Create the group opsrune and the users brenor, lyessa, and quillan. Create brenor and lyessa with opsrune as a supplementary group at creation time. Create sarahx without a home directory and with the shell /sbin/nologin.
Set the passwords of brenor, lyessa, and quillan to cinder9.
Allow members of opsrune to run /usr/sbin/useradd through sudo, and allow brenor to run /usr/bin/passwd for other users without a sudo password prompt.
hints: Use useradd -G when the supplementary group is known at account creation time.
Use visudo to edit sudo policy safely. Plain visudo as root is fine unless a task explicitly requires a drop-in file.
checks: ssh admin@servervm id -nG brenor | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx opsrune && ssh admin@servervm getent passwd brenor >/dev/null
ssh admin@servervm id -nG lyessa | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx opsrune && ssh admin@servervm getent passwd lyessa >/dev/null

ssh admin@servervm getent passwd quillan >/dev/null && ssh admin@servervm sudo passwd -S brenor | awk '{exit !($2 ~ /^P/)}' && ssh admin@servervm sudo passwd -S lyessa | awk '{exit !($2 ~ /^P/)}' && ssh admin@servervm sudo passwd -S quillan | awk '{exit !($2 ~ /^P/)}' && ssh admin@servervm getent passwd sarahx | awk -F: '{exit !($7=="/sbin/nologin")}' && ssh admin@servervm test ! -d /home/sarahx

ssh admin@servervm sudo visudo -cf /etc/sudoers >/dev/null && ssh admin@servervm sudo grep -ERq '^%opsrune[[:space:]]+ALL=\((ALL|root)\)[[:space:]]+/usr/sbin/useradd[[:space:]]*$' /etc/sudoers /etc/sudoers.d 2>/dev/null

ssh admin@servervm sudo visudo -cf /etc/sudoers >/dev/null && ssh admin@servervm sudo grep -ERq '^brenor[[:space:]]+ALL=\((ALL|root)\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]+/usr/bin/passwd[[:space:]]*$' /etc/sudoers /etc/sudoers.d 2>/dev/null
solution_outline: Create the group and all four accounts on servervm.
Set passwords only for the interactive accounts.
Write two sudo drop-ins and validate them with visudo.
task_titles: Create opsrune and the required users
Set the interactive user passwords to cinder9
